reviews.review_description: I'm not a musician or composer... so I can't begin to take advantage of the vast array of controls available to real musicians on this app. But oh was it great fun playing each of the instruments! Haptics and latency (or lack of it) on drums was quite stunning. Played piano as a child... the only thing I yearned for was hand tracking on the piano. Overall, wow!!

developer_response.body: Thank you, the app is designed for new musicians and old pros, delighted you enjoyed playing the fastest Drums in XR! Hand tracking on keys will be coming when the Quest hand-tracking latency and accuracy improves. Hope you continue making sweet sweet music :)

reviews.review_description:
Just had a small go at this new application. 

Although still in early access it’s already fun to try. 
Check the Spatial Audio, 120hz, visuals and mixed reality.

The drum and guitar sounds are awesome and there lots of features and visuals to check out.

The guitars and bass guitar are easy to play even if you never touched one in real life. 

Be sure to spend enough time on the drums and percussion as the haptics and latency are tuned for musicians.

developer_response.body: Really happy you had fun playing all the Instruments, and that you appreciate the low latency, visuals and haptics!! :)

reviews.review_title: The most complete virtual music studio.
reviews.review_description: There are many music apps in the Meta store, and a few dedicated to music creation, including several that are really fun. Among them, Instrument Studio stands out for its professional look, transforming your environment into a real recording studio with access to a wide range of tools and musical instruments. I won't deny it: it's a little intimidating at first because it requires some learning if you want to master all its features. However, it's also fun and functional for those who don't know much about music. Personally, I quite like the chord system for the guitars, and the percussion is also very satisfying. The keyboard and the comprehensive synthesizer are, in my opinion, more complex to use. It's true that I've occasionally encountered some typical early access bugs, such as reversed or mixed guitars, but overall, it works quite well, and I'm confident that these errors will be fixed. Not to nitpick, but if I had to make a request, or just express a wish, I'd like the program to include a functional hand-tracking option, and I'd also like to have some wind instruments available beyond the synthesizer's built-in options. Overall, Instrument Studio is a very complete application and highly recommended for both professional and casual use.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your detailed and accurate review, and will use it to make the app even better and easier to use in future. Big thanks for being part of our journey, we have more instruments to come, next will be a Flute just for you! :)

reviews.review_description:
Love the app been playing the piano  and organs drum kid is good as  you Chang it all round . 
Sequencer  handy aswell ,going to some fun with this app..

developer_response.body: Delighted you are having fun and love the app, keep making loads of sweet sweet music!! :)

reviews.review_title: We need more of this in VR
reviews.review_description: This is a great early access app that has so much potential as it develops.  The sequencer in particular (although the tempo was not being very response) is a joy to use with your hands.  Love to see this exapanded and a Piano roll too as using your hands feels so natural.

developer_response.body: Thank you, nice you appreciate the sequencer interaction,  have a Piano Roll and Score Writer on the to-do list :)

reviews.review_description: This app begins a new era in virtual reality music creation. You can choose among a variety of instruments with orchestral and electronic sounds. There is a vast range of editing tools.

developer_response.body: Thank you JayaJai, and thanks for being a music pioneer in this new era!! :)
